raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX I sent an email to the XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX requesting a duplicate wall certificate. I requested specifically a certificate and not a wall license. On XXXX I paid {$40.00} to the XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX after I received an invoice from them. On XXXX I received in the mail the wrong item. I received a wall license but I did not receive the certificate as requested. I contacted the XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX but they stopped responding. I initiated a dispute on the Citi mobile app, however I accidentally clicked Withdraw Dispute. I called Citi to inform them about the error, and I asked to to either fix the error or reinitiate the dispute. They told me they will get in touch with me. It has since been 7 days and when I call Citi they have no information. I am looking to the CFPB to help me resolve this issue so I zany have {$40.00} credited back to me.
